message:
feat: add Dolt-native conflict detection to bd doctor validate (GH-2249)

CheckGitConflicts now queries dolt_conflicts for unresolved merge conflicts
on Dolt backends instead of returning N/A. Reports error with table names
and conflict counts when conflicts exist.

Also fixes pre-existing test failure: TestValidateCheck_DetectsGitConflicts
was broken since SQLite backend removal (87493ce9) because GetBackend()
always returns "dolt". Replaced with TestValidateCheck_GitConflicts_DoltClean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
